input: dataframe with table schema of premodel
output: dataframe with two extra columns: surcharge_id and surcharge_name
description: For an input dataframe of charges, adds two columns: surcharge_id and surcharge_name to the dataframe. Use this function if the query is about surcharge information but surcharge_id and surcharge_name are not present in the shipments table. Charge descriptions are named differently in carrier invoice files but may represent the same surcharge and pricing. Retrieving surcharge_id and surcharge_name is necessary to correctly identify the charge type.

examples.question: What would the normalized surcharge name be for the demand surcharge on tracking number xyz?
Give me the surcharge ids and surcharge names for the tracking number abc for staging.
